actions.script: async function fetchSearchHTML(t,e){const r=new URLSearchParams({q:t,cc:e}),s=await fetch("https://www.bing.com/images/search?"+r.toString());return await s.text()}function extractTitle(t){const e=t.match(/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/i);return e?e[1].trim():""}function GetResultCount(t,e=""){const r=[".sb_count","#b_tween .sb_count",".b_pag .sb_count","#b_results .sb_count","span.sb_count"];for(const e of r){const r=t.querySelector(e);if(r){const t=r.textContent.replace(/[^\d]/g,"");if(t)return parseInt(t,10)}}if(e){const t=[/class="sb_count"[^>]*>([^<]+)</i,/>(\d[\d,\.]*?)\s+results?</i,/About\s+([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/([\d,]+)\s+results?/i];for(const r of t){const t=r.exec(e);if(t&&t[1]){const e=t[1].replace(/[^\d]/g,"");if(e)return parseInt(e,10)}}}return null}function extractImagesFromHTML(t,e=100){const r=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(t,"text/html").querySelectorAll("li[data-idx]"),s=[];return r.forEach(((t,r)=>{if(!(s.length>=e))try{const e={},c=t.querySelector("a.iusc"),n=c?.getAttribute("m"),a=n?JSON.parse(n.replace(/"/g,'"')):{},o=t.querySelector(".mimg"),i=t.querySelector(".lnkw a")?.href||"",u=i?new URL(i).hostname:"N/A";e.position=r+1,e.title=a?.t||"N/A",e.link=a?.murl||"N/A",e.domain=u,e.width=o?.getAttribute("width")||"N/A",e.height=o?.getAttribute("height")||"N/A",s.push(e)}catch(t){console.warn("Error extracting image at index",r,t)}})),s}async function processQuery(t,e){try{const r="https://www.bing.com/images/search?"+new URLSearchParams({q:t,cc:e}).toString(),s=await fetch(r),c=await s.text(),n=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(c,"text/html"),a=extractTitle(c),o=GetResultCount(n,c);return{success:!0,query:t,title:a,serp_result_count:o,image_results:extractImagesFromHTML(c)}}catch(e){return{success:!1,query:t,error:e.message}}}async function fetchSearches(t,e){return await Promise.all(t.map((t=>processQuery(t,e))))} var queryList='${queries}'.split(',').map(function(q){return q.trim()}).filter(function(q){return q.length>0}); var results=await fetchSearches(queryList,'${cc}'); return JSON.stringify(results);
